name: getOverallProgress picks non-deterministic curriculum for multi-curriculum subjects
description: [FCR 2026-06-21 · L1-07] no ORDER BY; new Map keeps last row per subjectId while the resume path orders desc(version) keeps first, so overview can compute against a different curriculum version. Fix: order desc(curricula.version) and keep first per subject.
acceptanceCriteria: Root cause: getOverallProgress loads curricula for all subjects without ordering, then builds a Map that keeps the last row per subjectId; when a subject has multiple curriculum versions this can choose a different version than the resume path, which orders by desc(curricula.version) and keeps the first. Variants: (a) one curriculum per subject remains unchanged, (b) multiple versions for a subject choose the latest version deterministically, (c) the overview and resume-target paths agree on curriculum selection. Regression test: apps/api/src/services/progress.test.ts fails without the fix and passes with it, seeding multiple curricula for one subject and asserting latest-version selection.
